name: @forwardimpact/svcpathway
description: Engineering standard queries over gRPC — career paths and agent profiles as derivable data for products.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Building a product feature that needs career paths or agent profiles and realizing the derivation logic would have to live in the product.
jobs.bigHire: query the engineering standard from any product without embedding derivation logic.
jobs.littleHire: fetch a derived role or agent profile without reimplementing the derivation.
jobs.competesWith: embedding libskill in each product; duplicating derivation logic; hardcoding role definitions
